channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Government, Serengeti Breweries work together to boost Sustainable Development initiatives
item.description: The Tanzanian government and Serengeti Breweries Limited have recently strengthened their collaboration to support the country's Sustainable Development Agenda. The partnership focuses on promoting re...

item.title: KP Governor asks Centre for support, advises CM Afridi to prioritise governance over political protests
item.description: Khyber Pakhtunkhwa Governor Faisal Karim Kundi has urged the federal government to pay serious attention to the province's pressing issues, stressing that Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif should personal...

item.title: Manchester United Prepare for Nottingham Forest Clash as Carrick Nears Permanent Managerial Role
item.description: Manchester United host Nottingham Forest at Old Trafford in the Premier League, with the Red Devils needing only a point to secure third place and complete a remarkable season turnaround under interim...

item.title: Chito Victolero returns to lead Mapua’s rebuilding effort in NCAA
item.description: Si Chito Victolero ay muling bumalik sa collegiate basketball scene sa NCAA upang pamunuan ang Mapua Cardinals, dala ang malinaw na layunin na muling buuin at palakasin ang koponan. Bilang isang beter...

item.title: Reece Walsh shines and struggles as Broncos suffer heavy defeat to Warriors
item.description: Reece Walsh had a rollercoaster performance for the Brisbane Broncos during their 42-12 thrashing by the New Zealand Warriors at Suncorp Stadium in Magic Round. The fullback showcased his brilliance w...

item.title: PM Modi explores Dutch water management for India’s Kalpasar Project
item.description: During his official visit to the Netherlands, Prime Minister Narendra Modi toured the Afsluitdijk dam, a crucial infrastructure that has protected the Dutch from flooding for decades while also suppor...

item.title: BARMM police officer caught with 2 kilos of shabu in PDEA operation

item.title: Tanzania Reaches Staff-Level Agreement with IMF for Additional Funding as Kenya's New Programme Talks Remain Inconclusive

item.title: Concerns Over GOP Policies Impacting Children and Education
item.description: The article critically examines recent actions and policies by the Republican Party under former President Donald Trump, highlighting concerns about their impact on children, families, and education. ...

item.title: Chuck Norris’ First Starring Role in 'Breaker! Breaker!' (1977)

item.title: Telangana issues heatwave advisory with safety measures and warning signs for heat-related illness
item.description: The Telangana Health Department has issued a fresh advisory warning citizens about the risks of heat-related illnesses as temperatures across the State are expected to rise further in the coming days....

item.title: Pune Botany Teacher Arrested by CBI Over NEET-UG 2026 Paper Leak
item.description: The Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI) has apprehended a Pune-based botany teacher, Manisha Gurunath Mandhare, in connection with the alleged leak of the 2026 NEET-UG examination papers. Mandhare, ...

item.title: Highlights and Insights from the 2026 Tour of Luzon
item.description: The 2026 MPTC Tour of Luzon has successfully wrapped up after 14 challenging stages covering over 1,800 kilometers across the island of Luzon. Thirteen teams participated in the event, showcasing both...

item.title: SNL Season Finale Features Controversial Trump-Epstein Sketch

item.title: WHO declares Ebola outbreak in DRC and Uganda a global health emergency
item.description: The World Health Organization (WHO) has officially declared the recent outbreak of a rare Ebola strain in the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC) and Uganda a public health emergency of internation...

item.title: Straight Womanhood: Misconceptions and Contemporary Perspectives
item.description: Phoebe Maltz Bovy’s article addresses the persistent misconceptions surrounding straight women’s desires and identities in modern culture. She reflects on the media response to Lindy West’s memoir, 'A...

item.title: Review of Auguste, an Italian Small Plates Restaurant in Hackney
item.description: Auguste is a newly opened Italian restaurant in Hackney, east London, occupying the former Papi site. The 32-seater space has been revamped with white tablecloths and a focus on small plates inspired ...

item.title: Iran Advocates for Legal Protections and Nuclear Rights at NPT Review Conference
